introSection: Looping is a steel roller coaster located at Family Fun in Duhok, Dohuk, Iraq. The ride used to operate at Tivoli Karolinelund between 1982 and 4 September 2010.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and blue supports. Used to feature red track and white supports at Karolinelund.

fullText:
Looping is a steel roller coaster located at Family Fun in Duhok, Dohuk, Iraq. The ride used to operate at Tivoli Karolinelund between 1982 and 4 September 2010.



Yellow track and blue supports. Used to feature red track and white supports at Karolinelund.
